TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_José_Mário_Vaz, title = José_Mário_Vaz, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/José_Mário_Vaz} }

S.FORM: José Mário Vaz I 1957 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 10 a romi'ad masofoc ci José Mário Vaz, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Guinea-bissau anini i ci José Mário Vaz, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 23 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: *o~us* m*rio~u b~va* i **** a miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi *o~us* m*rio~u b~va*, maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u *o~u~uinəa-b~b~vissao~u~u anini i ʦi *o~us* m*rio~u b~va*, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: José Mário Vaz I 1957 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 10 a romi'ad masofoc ci José Mário Vaz, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Guinea-bissau anini i ci José Mário Vaz, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 23 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: *o~us* m*rio~u b~va* i **** a miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi *o~us* m*rio~u b~va*, maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u *o~u~uinəa-b~b~vissao~u~u anini i ʦi *o~us* m*rio~u b~va*, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ.
